summary: Security analysis of changes: (1) No new auth bypass — JWT enforcement at line 4235 runs before GET handler reaches itemId branch. (2) itemId comes from URL path splitting (line 4253) and is only used as a comparison key in Array.find(), no injection vector. (3) SDK methods use encodeURIComponent for all URL parameters — no path traversal risk. (4) removeMember has proper owner guard (synchronous throw before any async operation). (5) No secrets or sensitive data exposed in new code. (6) getOne returns null from backend with HTTP 200 — no information leakage about collection existence vs item existence (collection must already be valid per regex check). All changes are backward-compatible and do not weaken existing security posture.
